top_signals.title: Walmart warns of petrol rationing as Iran war hits customers’ wallets
top_signals.summary: US retail giant’s shares plunge after saying it absorbed higher fuel expenses to hold down prices for consumers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bloom Energy rises 12% after partnering with European AI infrastructure upstart in $2.6 billion deal
top_signals.summary: Nebius said Wednesday that it would deploy Bloom's fuel-cell technology to generate electricity faster and more quickly at its data centers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nth Cycle, IonicRE team up to establish rare earth refining operations in the US
top_signals.summary: Joint development and licensing agreement will decrease dependency on China for rare earth refining and chemicals, companies say.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: HYPE token sets new record high above $60 amid rising Wall Street demand for Hyperliquid
top_signals.summary: Of note, Grayscale-linked wallets reportedly accumulated over $40 million worth of HYPE over the past week.
